summary: Comprehensive testing of St. Anthony Catholic Church website with CMS completed successfully. All major functionality tested and working.

fixed_bugs.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in create endpoints
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Modified create endpoints to return documents with _id field excluded

passed_tests: All 25 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section, mass times, announcements, events
Navigation to all public pages working (About, Mass & Sacraments, Sermons, Events, Gallery, Contact, Donate)
All admin CMS pages accessible (sermons, events, gallery, announcements, clergy, settings, donations, messages)
